discrepancies.observed: Selected indicator dot is positioned below the date.
discrepancies.expected: Indicator dot should be positioned above the day label to match design metadata (dot_above).
discrepancies.fix: Move the .dot div before the .day div in the HTML structure for the selected .scroller-item and adjust top/bottom margins to ensure it sits above the text.

discrepancies.observed: The subtext font-size is 11px, which is slightly smaller than the original.
discrepancies.expected: Subtext font-size should be 12px according to semantic metadata.

discrepancies.observed: The gap between scroller items is 8px.
discrepancies.expected: Previous validation suggested 12px, although metadata says 8px. The layout looks slightly crowded.
discrepancies.fix: Increase .el-05 { gap: 10px; } for better visual breathing room.
